title: November 18
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|November|hide31=yes}}
'''November 18''' is the 322nd day of the year (323rd in leap years). There are 43 days remaining.</noinclude>
*[[1940s#1946|1946]] – [[Alan Dean Foster]] is born.
*[[1950s#1953|1953]] – [[Alan Moore]] is born.
*[[1976]] – [[Dominic Armato]] is born.
*[[1992]] – [[Nathan Kress]] is born.
*[[1998]] – [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'']] trailer airs.
*1998 – [[Jedi Academy: Leviathan 2|''Jedi Academy: Leviathan'' 2]] published.
*[[2001]] – ''[[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron II: Rogue Leader]]'' released on the [[Wikipedia:Nintendo GameCube|GameCube]] platform.
*[[2003]] – "[[Clone Wars Chapter 8]]" airs on [[Cartoon Network]].
*[[2005]] – [[What's The Story?]] Round 3 published in the [[Databank (original)|Databank]].
*[[2008]] – [[Scum and Villainy (sourcebook)|''Scum and Villainy'']] published.
*[[2009]] – [[Knights of the Old Republic 47|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 47]] published.
*[[2011]] – "[[Carnage of Krell]]" airs on Cartoon Network.
*2011 – ''[[Minecraft]]'' released.
*[[2012]] – [[Wikipedia:Wii U|Wii U]] released.
*[[2015]] – [[Vader Down 1|''Vader Down'' 1]] published.
*2015 – [[Kanan 8|''Kanan'' 8]] published.
*2015 – [[Star Wars (2015) 12|''Star Wars'' (2015) 12]] published.
*2015 – "[[Blood Sisters]]" airs on [[Disney XD]].
*[[2018]] – "[[Synara's Score]]" airs on [[Disney Channel]].
*[[2019]] – [[Skydance New Media]] is founded.
*[[2020]] – [[Bounty Hunters 7|''Bounty Hunters'' 7]] published.
*2020 – [[Star Wars Adventures Annual 2020|''Star Wars Adventures Annual'' 2020]] published.
*2020 – [[Kirby Morrow]] died.
*[[2021]] – "[[Rancor (Galaxy of Creatures)|Rancor]]" premiered on the [[StarWarsKids.com|Star Wars Kids]] YouTube channel.
*2021 – "[[Tauntaun (Galaxy of Creatures)|Tauntaun]]" premiered on the Star Wars Kids YouTube channel.
*[[2025]] – ''[[Star Wars: Hyperspace Stories: The Bad Batch—Ghost Agents (trade paperback)]]'' published.
*2025 – ''[[Star Wars: The Sequel Trilogy Graphic Novel]]'' published. 
<noinclude>
